params.name: theme
params.description: Hero colour theme. Use brand, dark, or light. Defaults to brand.

params.name: variant
params.description: Hero containment variant. Use free or boxed. Defaults to free.

params.name: heading
params.description: Plain text heading for the Hero. Required unless headingHtml is provided.

params.name: headingHtml
params.description: Trusted HTML heading for the Hero. Use instead of heading when the heading needs markup.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Semantic heading level from 1 to 6. Defaults to 1.

params.name: descriptionHtml
params.description: Trusted HTML supporting copy. Replaces description when provided.

params.name: image
params.description: Hero media configuration with src, optional srcset, optional sizes, optional alt, and optional decorative. Set decorative to true only when the image adds no information; this renders an empty alt value and hides the image from assistive technology.

params.name: showDecoration
params.description: Set to false to disable the default decorative treatment.

params.name: element
params.description: Root element override. Use section or div. Defaults to section.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the Hero root.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the Hero root.
